title: Sum of Numbers With Units Digit K
titleCn: 个位数字为 K 的整数之和

testcases.input: num = 58, k = 9 Output: 2 Explanation: One valid set is [9,49], as the sum is 58 and each integer has a units digit of 9. Another valid set is [19,39]. It can be shown that 2 is the minimum possible size of a valid set.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: One valid set is [9,49], as the sum is 58 and each integer has a units digit of 9. Another valid set is [19,39]. It can be shown that 2 is the minimum possible size of a valid set.

testcases.input: num = 37, k = 2 Output: -1 Explanation: It is not possible to obtain a sum of 37 using only integers that have a units digit of 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: It is not possible to obtain a sum of 37 using only integers that have a units digit of 2.

testcases.input: num = 0, k = 7 Output: 0 Explanation: The sum of an empty set is considered 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The sum of an empty set is considered 0.
